title: fumaria × painteri
intro: Fumaria × painteri, also known as Painter's Fumitory, is a rare hybrid plant species that is a cross between Fumaria officinalis and Fumaria vaillantii, both belonging to the fumitory family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Fumaria × painteri include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to help manage anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
